name: Communications Agent
description: Dispatches critical-result and report-ready notifications over the configured channels once a study's report is finalized and verified.

skills.name: Dispatch critical-result notification
skills.description: Classify the finding (ACR), page the right provider, and open an acknowledgement clock. When the input carries an `escalation` slice (a fired sign-off ladder rung, #29 -- see escalation-policy.schema.json $defs/dispatchEscalation), its channels override urgency-based selection.

skills.name: Check acknowledgement
skills.description: Poll the acknowledgement Task for a sent notification; reports status and whether it is overdue.

skills.name: Escalate to on-call
skills.description: Escalate an unacknowledged critical result to the on-call provider (new notification + ack Task).
